entry.title: New: CR 25-57 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 82, CD1 (2025), to amend the definition of “authorized emergency vehicle” under the Maui Traffic Code to include emergency vehicles used by the Maui County Emergency Management Agency.

Disaster Recovery, International Affairs, and Planning Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
